title: tormentilla flagellaris
intro: Tormentilla flagellaris, also known as yellow cress or bitter cress, is a perennial plant in the mustard family native to Europe and Western Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its saponins, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of tormentilla flagellaris include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of tormentilla flagellaris can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to treat digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems.
